title: Argovas City
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:ArgovasCity.png|thumb|right|250px|A map of Argovas City and the surrounding region.]]

'''Argovas City''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Argovia]]. A [[Mining/Legends|mining]] town, it consisted mainly of prefabricated structures deployed during the initial settlement, though a few newer buildings had been built. A well-known landmark was ''[[Tanza's]]'' gambling parlor, a three-story [[Transparisteel/Legends|transparisteel]] edifice adorned with flashing lights, chrome statues, and many [[sanchango]] gambling machines. The rowdy and rough mining personnel living in the city would frequent Tanza's and the many bars in their off-hours.

Outside the town laid a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]], several mining complexes, and an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] sensor net complex built into the foothills of a nearby mountain range.
